title: Chapter 65
content:
Chapter 65

"Angh~ Ouung~~"

[You have stirred your hidden bloodline]

[A new quest has been created]

[Main Quest: The secrets of the Body]

[Rank: SSS]

[Description: You, who has been to many worlds, are now on another and a new adventure

But what's this?

There's something strange this time

The body you have, what secrets does it hide?]

[Task: Awaken the hidden bloodline]

"Hyangh~~!!! Aaannhh~~~!"

[Requirements:

#1: Drink ten liters of the divine nectars of females

#2: ???

#3: ???

#4: ???

#5: ???]

[Reward: ???]

[Punishment: The hidden bloodline would spiral out of control and go berserk]

[Time limit: 5 years]

[For completing the first requirement, a little of your bloodline has been released and assimilated with your body]

[All physical stats +10]

[Intelligence: +50]

[Charm: +50]

"Aau~~ Heu~~~ Hiiekk~~~"

Among Zara's heated moans, I read the notifications in my view and couldn't help but be amazed and equally worried. As the power rushed through me, the increasingly ominous feeling intensified even further.

And no, I wasn't worried about dying.

I was killed, burned, and thrown into molten lava before. But in the end, I was a human. Humans were afraid of the unknown.

"Hunn~~ Hiiaanhh~~"

And I was scared of that very unknown.

"Slurp~ Slluuurrrppp~~~"

What was the hidden bloodline mentioned here? What were its effects?

I knew nothing.

I had seen them before, individuals with special physiques. Though I had never been a special one to have them in any of my past lives, the fact that I had a system made me special more than the greatest of geniuses.

"Aheung~~~!!!!"

Splash!!!

Zara finally came. Okay, she finally came for the third time. Soft and limp, she flopped on the bed, her legs hanging down on my sides and on the bedside without an ounce of strength in them.

"Haa... Haa..."

Although she was the same after she came the first time, she didn't ask me to stop. And then again, and now this. The amazing part was that my tongue wasn't tired in the least. Sure, the power-up had something to do with it, but still, I felt like I could eat her out for eternity if it were possible.

"Are you satisfied, Lady Zara?" I asked as I gave her sensitive and quivering pussy small licks.

"Hng!!" She shivered and her pussy once again squirted some juices, and she replied, "N-No. I'm fine now."

It seemed like her period was acting up and she was feeling cramped, causing her mood to be on the worse side since the morning. Also explained why her daughter, whose name I wasn't privy to yet, was also in a bad mood.

Hadn't seen her sons, though. Well, whatever, like I care.

Anyway, another thing I was astonished by was the concept of periods. Now I had been here long enough, and, considering I spent an entire month in the forest, if there was the concept of periods, it should have shown up by now.

But ever since I got here, it hasn't. I did wonder why that was, but I just considered that to be the anatomy of this world. Just like how women didn't grow hair down there or on their armpits, or how the people of this world smelled alright, even though there was little to no basic hygiene.

"Can I be of any other help to you, Lady Zara?" I asked.

"No. I need to rest up now so you can leave." Zara said, a little out of breath but quite caught up now.

I nodded and made my way to the door, only to be surprised that Zara's daughter was still here. I didn't notice her much once I was gone into it, so it was a surprise she was still here.

"Are you done?" She asked.

"Yes," I replied. "Good." She replied before she glanced at her mother, who was still naked but had tucked herself under the covers by herself. No, to be more precise, she was looking at her mother's expression.

Once we were outside, she sighed and closed the door behind us before she began to walk away, "Follow me."

I didn't say anything once again and followed after her. Once we were a good distance from the room, she turned to me and said, "How did you do that?"

"Do what?" I asked.

"That. How did you cure Mother's illness?" She asked.

"Illness?" I asked, honestly, a little confused.

"Yes. Every month, around this time, mother's illness acts up, and she becomes irritated and annoyed by almost everything. Usually, she just remains in an isolated room until it's over, but contact is inevitable and the consequences are drastic." She explained.

As she did, the gears in my head circulated at breakneck speed, and finally, I came to only one conclusion.

"May I ask a question?" I asked.

"What?" She asked, not offended even though I hadn't addressed her without a proper title since the beginning.

"Do you have the same illness?" I asked.

"Fortunately, no. It doesn't seem to be hereditary, as my grandmother didn't have it, and no one else has it. Only mother does, and even the priests of the church haven't been able to figure anything out, let alone countless physicians at our disposal." She explained once again.

It finally ticked.

Zara was the only one in this world who could have a period. Well, there could be others, but I only knew of her. It was strange as I had expected, since the women in Jack's, aka my family, hadn't had their periods ever since I came here.

Was there something special about Zara? I didn't know, but what I knew for sure was that it didn't have anything to do with me, given that it was a long-term problem even before my transmigration.

"Unfortunately," I said, gaining her attention, "What I did wasn't curing her. I just curbed her condition a little bit. She will go back to it soon enough."

"Darn it." She whispered a curse before she thought for a while and asked, "Then can you stay here to help her? I'll compensate you for your troubles."

"..." To be honest, I wasn't quite thrilled about this. A normal period lasted between anywhere from 2 to 8-9 days. The usual time period for most of the women was 5 days. Considering hers lasted for the same amount of time, staying here for five days didn't seem that enticing when I had the women in the family to enjoy myself.

However, before I could reply, "If it is about your family, you can move into the house next to us. Although it was built for me, I don't mind giving it to you. In return, let's keep this agreement for a long time."

So her talent lied in negotiations, huh? I was a little surprised how she gleaned what the problem could be even without me saying, and hit the mark in an instant. She was talented in business, not being a knight, from the looks of it.

"If that is how you want to do it, I want it to be done in written form, my lady." I smiled and said.

"Is my word not enough?" It sounded like she was offended, but her face didn't show anything like that.

"While I trust you, my lady, I'd rather not be a servant who took advantage of everyone. And if the lord returned, the authority would be in his hand, so it would be assuring to have his daughter's word." I replied.

"..." She looked at me, smiling for a moment before she said, "Although that won't happen, I will still form a contract. Is that enough?"

"Yes, my lady," I replied. I was already pushing it, so asking for the compensation she was talking about wasn't a good idea. Let's be happy with getting a house for free for now.

But, "Could I ask for one more thing, my lady?" Now her face turned to that of a frown as she asked, "What?"

"Tending to the lady would be a very precious task. It would be reassuring if you were to be present there."

Yeah, from her point of view, it could be interpreted as, 'I don't want to be beheaded if something were to go wrong during her treatment.'

But what I wanted was to have some mother-daughter fun. Although it wouldn't be a threesome since I wouldn't be doing them together, if this chance had arrived already, why not use her in the process?

She looked at me, contemplated for a while, from her point of view, of course, and nodded after a long time of thinking.

"Very well. I shall be present with you all the time and provide any sort of assistance if necessary." She replied and turned to leave, waving her armored covered ass from left to right, but as I may have mentioned before, it wasn't as quite enticing as I would have thought.

I sighed and finally turned my attention to the stuff from before. Since I had nothing to do, it was better to remain near Zara's room.

As for now, let's look into this bloodline thing.

~~

Let me know if there are any errors.
